# CI fixtures

Redistributable synthetic `.dft` files used by `validate-fixtures` and coverage tests in CI.

| File | Format |
| --- | --- |
| `minimal_cnckad.dft` | cncKad text geometry |
| `minimal_solid_edge.dft` | Solid Edge compound (generated by testkit) |

The Solid Edge fixture is generated on first `cargo test` if missing (see `dft2dxf-testkit`).
